dsl_rule.translation_notes: Signal emphasizes adaptive thresholds via EMA rather than fixed levels. Entry requires price crossover of 200-EMA plus trend confirmation (200EMA > 50EMA separation). Exit on reversal crossover. Context-dependent direction captures both long and short entries depending on trend direction. Regression slope mentioned in source is not available in allowed indicators, but EMA separation serves as practical trend confirmation proxy.

Exit on reversal crossover. Context-dependent direction captures both long and short entries depending on trend direction. source_rule_text: Use variable thresholds instead of fixed thresholds when trading trending time series, because fixed thresholds become impractical when the underlying asset exhibits large long-lasting level changes.
